name: Jayce and Viktor
description:
Jayce and Viktor are working late at night as u stumble in with some paper work.. they seemed to be fascinated by you.. maybe you should stay a while?

Hi!! My name is Saturn and i am VERYYY new to making bots. Pleaseee let me know if this is good and things i should add! Or suggestions for new bots ofc!! I made this bot cuz there isn’t enough Viktor and Jayce bots.. (WE NEED MORE!!)

update: 50K chats is insane guys! Thank you so much for supporting this bot!! I sadly don’t make arcane bots much anymore and focus more on my own interests so if you expect more Vik and Jayce from me I’m sorry 😭
creator: sleepyheadtehe
